channel.title: RSS on Lazurkin
channel.description: Recent content in RSS on Lazurkin

item.title: GrammarMama
item.description:
GrammarMama is an AI-powered grammar checker and translator that instantly corrects text, explains every mistake, and translates between languages — no signup required.

Paste your text, and it returns a fully corrected version along with a structured list of mistakes with clear explanations. You can also translate the result into another language in the same step.

Key features:

  • No signup — zero friction, just paste and correct
  • Full corrected text shown immediately, not just inline suggestions
  • Translation — translate to and from English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, and Russian
  • Structured mistake list with educational explanations for each error
  • Mixed-language detection — foreign words are identified and translated into the target language
  • Multilingual — verify grammar in English, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Russian, and more

The tool uses Claude API to analyze and correct text input.

item.title: SkyBridge
item.description:
SkyBridge is my rock band revived in early 2025.

Style is an alternative rock. There I play guitar, piano, accordion and sign.

We have recordings from 2010 and several new songs. You can find them on Spotify, YouTube Music, Soundcloud or directly on the web-site.

item.title: Text2Event
item.description:
Text2Event is a tiny productivity tool to create calendar events from text description.

It does not require any sign up and produces ICS files as well as deep links for Google Calendar, Outlook Live and Microsoft 365.

There are several quick access options like

  • Text2Event Chrome extension
  • Progressive Web Application (PWA) which in combination with Google Chrome on Android gives a native-like experience. I like share text with Text2Event PWA which automatically generates ICS file that is smoothlessly opened by Google Calendar.
  • and iOS Shortcut

The tool uses Claude API to parse text input.
